title: crash in erroneous nested query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE crash_me (a INT, b CHAR(10), c BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO crash_me (a, b, c) VALUES (1, 'test', TRUE);
CREATE TABLE crash_q (a INT, b CHAR(10));
SELECT b FROM crash_me WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM crash_q WHERE crash_q.a = crash_me.a);
